parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant Issuer
participant Contract

Issuer -> Contract : <math>Revoke(h(Root_{ct}), reason)</math>
Contract -> Contract : <math>MarkCredentialAsRevoked(h(Root_{ct}))</math>
Contract -> Contract : <math>Event: CredentialRevoked(h(Root_{ct}), reason, timestamp)</math>
@enduml
```
